summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. All documentation is complete and well-structured. README has installation, quickstart, and benchmarks. SKILL.md is compact (3916 chars) and all documented commands work. All 5 ADRs are Accepted. Recommendation memo has all 4 required sections. Maintainability audit covers all 5 areas with 8 remediated issues. No dead experimental code in main source; spikes preserved as labeled archive.
